name: Email Archive
summary: Full-text search over an exported (mbox) email history -- find any old email in milliseconds.
description: Indexes a Gmail Takeout .mbox export into a node-local SQLite FTS index and adds an instant, searchable lens (search box + results with highlighted snippets + a message reader). Read-only; the archive never leaves this machine. Backed by the core helper command-center/email_archive.py + the /api/email-* routes; the lens only appears where the extension is installed.

help.sub: Ask a question or search your old exported email -- by sender, subject, or anything in the body.
help.h:
What: a smart search over a big email export (a Gmail Takeout .mbox). Ask a real question and it reads only the handful of most-relevant emails to answer -- with citations -- so it stays cheap; or search by keyword and narrow by contact/year/conversation. Every result opens to read or drags into a Claude session.

Why: years of old email (e.g. from a previous job) stay useful -- get an answer or pull up that one thread from two years ago without ever loading it back into Gmail (or into an AI's whole context).

How: point it at the .mbox file (config email_archive_mbox), build the index once (python3 command-center/email_archive.py index <mbox> <db>), then Ask or search. Read-only -- the archive never leaves this machine.

email_archive_mbox.label: Path to the .mbox export (Gmail Takeout Mail)

email_archive_db.label: Path for the search index (SQLite); defaults under the node state dir

draggables.label: Archived email
draggables.note: Drag any search result onto a Claude session (or into the Basket) to hand the agent the full email -- headers + body -- as context. Resolved server-side from the local index by id.

agent_cli: cc-email ask "<question>" | cc-email search "<query>" [limit] | cc-email get <id> | cc-email thread <id> | cc-email contacts | cc-email stats
